tasks.label: Start Postgres (docker compose)
tasks.detail: Starts the docker-compose postgresql service, waits for it to become healthy.

tasks.label: Stop Postgres (docker compose)
tasks.detail: Stops the docker-compose postgresql service. Data volume is preserved.

tasks.label: Flyway migrate
tasks.detail: Applies pending Flyway schema migrations against the dev database.

tasks.label: Seed dev data
tasks.detail: Inserts sample categories, boards, users (admin/alice/bob/carol — password 'password123'), threads and messages. Tracked in flyway_seed_history; safe to re-run (no-op if already applied).

tasks.label: Reset DB and seed
tasks.detail: Nuclear reset: drops and recreates the zfgbb schema (with the same ownership/grants the docker init sets up), reapplies all migrations, then seeds dev data. Use when the dev DB has gotten into a bad state.
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgresql psql -U postgres -d zfgc_dev -c 'drop schema if exists zfgbb cascade; create schema zfgbb authorization zfgbb_user; alter schema zfgbb owner to zfgcadmin; grant usage, create on schema zfgbb to zfgbb_user; grant zfgcadmin to zfgbb_user;' && mvn flyway:migrate && mvn flyway:migrate -Pseed
